jd_text: We're partnered with a growing, forward-thinking organisation seeking a Head of IT. This is a pivotal leadership role for a well-rounded IT professional who thrives in both strategic planning and hands-on environments. Key Responsibilities - Define and execute the organisation’s IT strategy aligned with business goals - Oversee all aspects of IT, including infrastructure, networks, applications, security, hardware, and software - Lead cybersecurity initiatives, ensuring robust protection, compliance, and risk management - Advise the business on IT architecture, systems implementation, and digital transformation - Manage vendors, budgets, and IT roadmaps - Drive continuous improvement and introduce scalable processes and governance - Explore and implement emerging technologies, including AI-driven solutions, where appropriate Requirements - Proven experience in a senior IT leadership role - Strong generalist IT background across infrastructure, networks, applications, and security - Experience working in SMEs or scaling businesses, with the ability to introduce enterprise-level practices - Strategic thinker with a hands-on approach when needed - Demonstrated experience advising leadership teams and influencing business decisions - Solid understanding of cybersecurity frameworks and risk management - Exposure to or interest in AI technologies and their business applications For further information or a confidential discussion, please get in touch.
